auth.label: Countdown API Key
auth.description: Countdown API key sent as the api key query parameter. Get one from the Countdown API sign-up page: https://app.countdownapi.com/signup

actions.name: autocomplete
actions.description: Get eBay autocomplete suggestions for a search term through Countdown API.

search_term.description: The eBay search term to query.

ebay_domain.description: The eBay domain to query, such as ebay.com, ebay.co.uk, or ebay.de.

data.description: The Countdown API response payload returned by the action.

error.description: Error if any occurred during the action execution.

successful.description: Whether the action execution was successful.

actions.name: get_account
actions.description: Retrieve Countdown API account usage, quota, and platform status details.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving Countdown API account details.

data.description: The Countdown API response payload returned by the action.

error.description: Error if any occurred during the action execution.

successful.description: Whether the action execution was successful.

actions.name: get_product
actions.description: Retrieve eBay product details by product ID through Countdown API.

epid.description: The eBay EPID product ID to retrieve.

gtin.description: The GTIN, ISBN, UPC, or EAN code to convert to an eBay EPID.

ebay_url.description: The eBay page URL to retrieve through Countdown API.

ebay_domain.description: The eBay domain to query, such as ebay.com, ebay.co.uk, or ebay.de.

skip_gtin_cache.description: Whether to force a fresh GTIN to EPID lookup.

include_parts_compatibility.description: Whether to include product parts compatibility details.

customer_location.description: The customer country location to use for eBay retrieval.

customer_zipcode.description: The customer ZIP or postal code to use for eBay retrieval.

include_fields.description: A comma-separated list of response field paths.

exclude_fields.description: A comma-separated list of response field paths.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving an eBay product through Countdown API.

data.description: The Countdown API response payload returned by the action.

error.description: Error if any occurred during the action execution.

successful.description: Whether the action execution was successful.

actions.name: search_products
actions.description: Search eBay products through Countdown API with optional filters.

search_term.description: The eBay search term to query.

ebay_url.description: The eBay page URL to retrieve through Countdown API.

ebay_domain.description: The eBay domain to query, such as ebay.com, ebay.co.uk, or ebay.de.

page.description: The result page number to request, starting at 1.

max_page.description: The maximum result page number to retrieve when supported.

category_id.description: The eBay category ID used to narrow the search.

listing_type.description: The eBay listing type filter to apply.

condition.description: The eBay item condition filter to apply.

enum: price high to low plus postage
price low to high plus postage
sort_by.description: The Countdown API sort option for product search results.

num.description: The number of search results to request. Valid values are 60, 120, or 240.

facets.description: Comma-separated eBay search facets, such as brand=sandisk,format=microsd.

sold_items.description: Whether to filter search results to sold items.

completed_items.description: Whether to filter search results to completed items.

authorized_sellers.description: Whether to filter search results to authorized seller items.

returns_accepted.description: Whether to filter search results to returns accepted items.

free_returns.description: Whether to filter search results to free return items.

authenticity_verified.description: Whether to filter search results to authenticity verified items.

deals_and_savings.description: Whether to filter search results to deals and savings items.

sale_items.description: Whether to filter search results to sale items.

allow_rewritten_results.description: Whether to include rewritten eBay results.

customer_location.description: The customer country location to use for eBay retrieval.

customer_zipcode.description: The customer ZIP or postal code to use for eBay retrieval.

include_fields.description: A comma-separated list of response field paths.

exclude_fields.description: A comma-separated list of response field paths.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for searching eBay products through Countdown API.

data.description: The Countdown API response payload returned by the action.

error.description: Error if any occurred during the action execution.

successful.description: Whether the action execution was successful.
